productName: Zoots - Gummies - REST - CBN 2:1 - Hibiscus Guava Honey
description: Handcrafted sweet tropical guava gummies inspired by old-world confectionery, where bright fruit purée, glossy sugar, and a silky cannabis infusion come together in one irresistible chew. It blends THC for a classic euphoric lift and CBD to keep things calm and balanced in a 2:1 ratio. A dessert-style hybrid treat with the kind of flavor that makes dosing feel like a reward.
